main.description: Reassign a group's owner. Operator-only: authenticated with HTTP Basic auth (username "admin") against the service ADMIN_PASSWORD, not group membership. The previous owner is demoted to admin; the new owner must already be a member and is promoted in place.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the target group.

newOwner.description: The handle or DID of the member to make owner.

previousOwner.description: The DID demoted from owner to admin, if there was one.

noop.description: True when newOwner was already the owner and nothing changed.

errors.name: UnknownGroup
errors.description: The repo does not resolve to a managed group.

errors.name: MemberNotFound
errors.description: newOwner resolves to a DID that is not a member of the group.
